User: History semantics packet ledger theme should stay bounded and authoritative.
The source evidence remains explicit for the released slice and theme anchor.
Assistant: History semantics packet ledger theme follow-up.
- Ontological lane is the downstream packet overlay over the released ledger and theme anchor.
- Epistemic lane keeps evidence grounded to released source provenance and concrete entries.
- Deontic lane must stay fail-closed and must not widen into workspace synthesis.
- Utility lane helps later bounded follow-up work.
